details.raw_snippet: #3 ERROR: failed to solve: eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpne: not found

candidates.reason: FROM instruction references misspelled image tag '21-jdk-alpne'
checked - no issues found, references built image not base image
checked - unrelated to build stage error

details.root_cause: Typo in Stage 1 FROM instruction: 'eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpne' instead of 'eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine' (letters 'n' and 'e' are transposed at the end of 'alpine')
details.explanation: Docker cannot pull the builder base image because the tag '21-jdk-alpne' does not exist in Docker Hub. The correct tag is '21-jdk-alpine'. Stage 2 uses the correct 'eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine', confirming the intended pattern.

act_build_and_test.reason: Docker daemon not available in WSL2 sandbox environment (unix:///var/run/docker.sock not found) — infrastructure constraint, not related to the patch

docker_compose_config.reason: Docker CLI not installed in WSL2 environment

details.conclusion: All available static checks passed. Dynamic checks skipped due to environment constraint (no Docker daemon). Patch is correct: typo fix confirmed by hadolint and by visual inspection of Stage 2 which uses the same correct pattern.

details.commit_message: fix(DOCKERFILE_ERROR): corectare typo în tag-ul base image Stage 1
